answers.value: Bright Futures Community Learning Center, Inc. partners with youth and families in under-resourced Columbus neighborhoods to provide accessible, high-quality after-school, summer, and family learning programs that close academic gaps and nurture social-emotional growth.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: We create safe, relationship-centered spaces where students in grades 1–12 receive individualized tutoring, enrichment in STEM and the arts, and mentoring that affirms their identities and expands their postsecondary and career opportunities.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: Through deep collaboration with local schools, community organizations, and caregivers, we work to break cycles of educational inequity and empower young people to become confident, engaged leaders in their communities.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: Primary: Near East Side, South Side, and Hilltop neighborhoods of Columbus, Franklin County, Ohio. Secondary: broader Columbus City Schools district through partnerships and referral-based enrollment.
